description.value: Aura faint transmutation; CL 5th; Slot belt; Price 2,600 gp; Weight â DESCRIPTION Long believed to have been gnome in origin, this stately cummerbund features a number of dancing dolphins embroidered on its deep blue material. The cummerbund grants its wearer a +4 competence bonus on Swim checks, and allows her to take 10 on such checks even if distracted or endangered. CONSTRUCTION REQUIREMENTS Feats Craft Wondrous Item, touch of the sea; Cost 1,300 gp.
